import sys
import inspect

sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
from tsr.system import TSR
from tsr.utils import get_spherical_cameras

print('TSR.render signature:', inspect.signature(TSR.render))
print('get_spherical_cameras signature:', inspect.signature(get_spherical_cameras))

print('=== TSR.render source ===')
print(inspect.getsource(TSR.render))
